name: Bug report
about: Report crashes, false positives, wrong parsing, or UI regressions

labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Quick Summary
Short description of the bug in 1-2 sentences.

## Diagnostics JSON (required)
In LiveBridge app: open **Settings** -> tap **Report a bug**.  
The app copies diagnostics JSON to clipboard automatically. Paste it here:

```json
{}
```

## Type of Bug
- [ ] Crash
- [ ] False positive conversion (notification should NOT become Live Update)
- [ ] False negative conversion (notification should become Live Update, but does not)
- [ ] Wrong stage/progress/status
- [ ] OTP/code detection issue
- [ ] UI/UX issue
- [ ] Other

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Expected Behavior
What should happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

## Notification Sample (important)
Paste anonymized notification content if possible:

```text
App package: com.example.app
Notification title:
Notification text:
```

## Media / Screenshots
Attach screenshots or short screen recording if available.

## Additional Context
Any extra details that may help reproduce the issue.
